creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On 10/26/11 21:56, Florian Smeets wrote:
> jam builds just fine on 9.0-RC1, do you have any special flags in
> make.conf? Or did you try using clang?

Well, my PR is quite some days old and since then things has happened to
the ports and FreeBSD itself.

As far as I can tell, devel/jam compiles fine on FreeBSD
10.0-CURRENT/amd64 (CLANG) and FreeBSD 9.0-RC1/amd64 (CLANG).

I think the PR can be closed so far.

Regards,
Oliver
